about_preview.title: About Manpadale Highschool
about_preview.description: Our school is a community-driven educational institute working in the rural, mountainous region of Manapdle, where access to quality education and student development opportunities is limited due to geography, economic constraints, and lack of infrastructure.The institute was established with a strong belief that every child—regardless of location or background—deserves holistic education and equal opportunities to grow. We focus not only on academic excellence but also on the overall development of students in every form: intellectual, physical, emotional, moral, and social.

admission_preview.step1_desc: Fill out the online admission form with required details
admission_preview.step2_desc: Submit and verify all necessary documents
admission_preview.step3_desc: Complete payment and receive admission confirmation

about_page.title: About Greenfield High
about_page.subtitle: Building excellence through quality education and holistic development for over 35 years
about_page.story_text1: Founded in 1985, Greenfield High School began as a small institution with a big vision: to provide quality education that nurtures both mind and character. Over the past three decades, we have grown into one of the region's most respected educational institutions, serving over 2,000 students from diverse backgrounds.
about_page.story_text2: Our journey has been marked by continuous innovation in teaching methodologies, infrastructure development, and student welfare programs. We believe that education extends beyond textbooks, focusing on developing critical thinking, creativity, and ethical values that prepare students for real-world challenges.
about_page.story_text3: Today, we stand proud as an institution that consistently produces outstanding results while maintaining a warm, inclusive environment where every student feels valued and supported in their educational journey.
about_page.principal_message: Welcome to Greenfield High School. As Principal, it is my privilege to lead an institution dedicated to academic excellence and holistic development. Our commitment is to nurture every student's potential, foster critical thinking, and instill values that prepare them for life's challenges. We believe education is not just about grades, but about developing compassionate, confident individuals who will make a positive impact on society. Our dedicated faculty, state-of-the-art facilities, and supportive community work together to ensure every student experiences a transformative educational journey. I invite you to join our Greenfield family and be part of a tradition of excellence.
about_page.vision_text: To be a leading educational institution that empowers students to become compassionate, confident, and capable individuals who contribute positively to society. We envision a future where our students emerge as global citizens equipped with knowledge, skills, and values to make a meaningful difference in the world.
about_page.mission_text: To provide a nurturing and stimulating learning environment that promotes academic excellence, character development, and lifelong learning. We are committed to fostering critical thinking, creativity, and social responsibility while respecting diversity and encouraging each student to achieve their full potential.
about_page.facilities_subtitle: Infrastructure designed to enhance learning and development
about_page.smart_classrooms_desc: Interactive digital boards and modern teaching aids for enhanced learning experience
about_page.library_desc: Extensive collection of books, journals, and online resources for comprehensive research
about_page.labs_desc: Well-equipped Physics, Chemistry, and Biology labs with modern equipment
about_page.sports_desc: Multi-sport facility including basketball, volleyball, and athletics track
about_page.computer_desc: State-of-the-art computer lab with latest software and high-speed internet
about_page.auditorium_desc: Modern auditorium for events, performances, and academic gatherings
about_page.faculty_subtitle: Experienced educators dedicated to student success

admission_page.title: Admissions
admission_page.subtitle: Begin your educational journey with Greenfield High School
admission_page.overview_text: Greenfield High School welcomes applications from students seeking admission to classes from Nursery to Grade 12. Our admission process is designed to be transparent, fair, and inclusive, ensuring that we identify students who will thrive in our academic environment and contribute positively to our school community.
admission_page.overview_text2: We assess students based on their academic potential, learning attitude, and alignment with our school's values. Our admission committee carefully reviews each application to ensure the best fit for both the student and our institution.
admission_page.process_subtitle: Four simple steps to join our community
admission_page.form_subtitle: Fill out the form below and our admissions team will contact you soon
admission_page.success_msg: Thank you for your interest. Our admissions team will contact you within 2 business days.
admission_page.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

donate_page.title: Support Our Mission
donate_page.subtitle: Your contribution helps us provide quality education and create opportunities for deserving students
donate_page.why_text1: At Greenfield High School, we believe that quality education should be accessible to all students, regardless of their financial background. Your generous donations help us bridge the gap and create equal opportunities for every child to excel.
donate_page.why_text2: Over the years, contributions from alumni, parents, and well-wishers have enabled us to provide scholarships to deserving students, upgrade our facilities, and introduce innovative learning programs. Every donation, big or small, makes a tangible difference in a student's life.
donate_page.why_text3: We maintain complete transparency in how donations are utilized. Annual reports detailing fund allocation and impact are shared with all donors, ensuring your trust in our commitment to educational excellence.
donate_page.learning_desc: Support students with books, stationery, and educational resources
donate_page.learning_impact: Help 50+ students access quality learning materials
donate_page.digital_desc: Contribute to upgrading technology and digital infrastructure
donate_page.volunteer_desc: Share your expertise and time with our students
donate_page.volunteer_impact: Guide and inspire the next generation
donate_page.financial_desc: General donations for scholarships and school development
donate_page.financial_impact: Make quality education accessible to all
donate_page.how_subtitle: Multiple convenient options to support our cause
donate_page.upi_desc: Quick and easy payment through any UPI app
donate_page.visit_desc: Donate in person at our administrative office
donate_page.form_subtitle: Let us know how you'd like to contribute, and we'll get in touch
donate_page.faq_a1: Yes, all donations to Greenfield High School are eligible for tax deductions under Section 80G.
donate_page.faq_q2: How will my donation be used?
donate_page.faq_a2: Your donation directly supports student scholarships, infrastructure development, and educational programs.
donate_page.faq_q3: Can I donate in kind instead of money?
donate_page.faq_a3: Absolutely! We welcome donations of books, computers, sports equipment, and other educational materials.
donate_page.form_success: Thank you, we'll reach out to you soon.
donate_page.form_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.about_text: Empowering students to achieve their full potential through quality education, innovation, and holistic development.
